Reliable Electrical Solutions for Boise

Certified Electric LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide top-quality electrical services to the Boise community. We saw a need for electricians who were not only skilled and knowledgeable, but also committed to honesty, integrity, and customer satisfaction. We've built our reputation on those principles.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our electrician services.

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Common signs include flickering lights, frequently tripped breakers, and the use of multiple extension cords. If you're planning to add new appliances or renovate your home, an upgrade may also be necessary.

How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?

The duration depends on the complexity of the job, but most panel upgrades can be completed in one day. We'll provide you with a more accurate estimate during our initial assessment.

Is it safe to attempt an electrical panel upgrade myself?

No. Electrical work is inherently dangerous and should only be performed by a licensed and qualified electrician. Our team ensures safety and code compliance.

Reviews From Our Electrician Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Certified Electric upgraded my electrical panel in my older North End home. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. I had no idea my old panel was so outdated! Now I feel much safer and can finally run all my appliances without tripping breakers. Great service!"

Alice K. Electrical Panel Upgrade

"Had a couple of outlets that weren't working. Certified Electric came out quickly and fixed the problem. They were polite and professional. The price was reasonable, and I appreciate their prompt service."

Bob M. Outlet Repair

"Certified Electric installed recessed lighting in my kitchen. They did an amazing job! The new lights completely transformed the space, and I couldn't be happier. The electricians were skilled and meticulous. I highly recommend them!"

Sarah L. Lighting Installation
